title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Cox & Kings India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Cox & Kings India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, Cox & Kings India in Howrah is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Cox & Kings India:
Cox & Kings India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cox & Kings India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
